history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young person with a bowl cut hairstyle, partially obscuring their face by zipping up a red camouflage BAPE hoodie. The hoodie features the iconic BAPE shark graphic on the hood lining, with sharp teeth details. The camouflage pattern is in shades of red and dark red. The person's eyes are visible and looking directly at the camera. A hand is pulling the zipper up, with fingers visible on the zipper pull. The background appears to be the interior of a car, with a light-colored headliner and seat visible. The lighting is natural and soft, coming from above and slightly to the side, creating subtle shadows. The overall mood is casual and a bit mysterious due to the partially hidden face. The color palette is dominated by the vibrant red and dark red of the hoodie, contrasted with the neutral tones of the car interior and the dark hair. The image has a slightly grainy, authentic feel, possibly from a phone camera.
